title: 2026 Grammy Awards: Full Winners & Nominees List - Album of the Year
text: The 2026 Grammy Awards Album of the Year category featured eight nominees. Winner: Bad Bunny for DeBÍ TiRAR MáS FOToS, produced by Big Jay, La Paciencia, MAG & Tainy with engineers/mixers Antonio Caraballo, Josh Gudwin, Luis Amed Irizarry & Roberto José Rosado Torres. Other nominees included: Justin Bieber for SWAG, Sabrina Carpenter for Man's Best Friend, Clipse with Pusha T & Malice for Let God Sort Em Out, Lady Gaga for MAYHEM, Kendrick Lamar for GNX, Leon Thomas for MUTT, and Tyler, The Creator for CHROMAKOPIA. The Recording Academy's voting members, comprising music creators including artists, producers, songwriters, and engineers, determined the winner through their peer-voted process. This marked a historic year where all eight nominees were first-time Album of the Year contenders, guaranteeing a first-time winner regardless of the outcome.
